name: Ahmed Whaleed
bio: IT Engineer with a Computer Engineering degree (2019). After working in a different field after graduation, I returned to IT in 2024 and have since built strong hands-on experience in systems, servers, and infrastructure. I continuously improve my skills through practical work and learning, with a strong interest in programming and system internals. My goal is to grow into a DevOps Engineer role.

projects.title: captionly 🅾  𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦 ★【ꚠ】Tikok
projects.desc:
Captionly is an AI-powered web app that generates high-quality social media captions, hashtags, and posting tips for content creators.

It is designed to help you create viral-ready posts in seconds for:

📸 Instagram
🎵 TikTok  required API
tech: Python 🐍 Streamlit 🎈 Google Gemini API 🤖 Docker 🐳 Prompt Engineering 🧠

projects.title: Task Manager FastApi ⚡
projects.desc:
User registration and login with JWT authentication
Passwords are hashed (never stored in plain text)
Full CRUD for tasks (create, read, update, delete)
Each user only sees and manages their own tasks
Automatic interactive API docs at /docs
Automated tests with pytest
tech: FastAPI — web framework SQLAlchemy — database ORM Pydantic — data validation SQLite — database python-jose — JWT tokens passlib + bcrypt — password hashing pytest — testing

projects.title: Expense Tracker 💰
projects.desc: A modern, user-friendly web application for tracking personal expenses. Built with Flask and featuring a clean, intuitive interface with interactive charts and multi-currency support.
tech: JavaScript UI Framework: Bootstrap 5 Icons: Bootstrap Icons Charts: Chart.js Security: Werkzeug (password hashing)

projects.title: Free CV Builder
projects.desc: Build a professional, ATS-friendly CV in minutes. Fill in your details, watch a clean CV assemble itself live, and export a crisp PDF. An AI review flags gaps and weak spots before you send it.
tech: React 18 + Vite 6 lucide-react (icons) mammoth (Word file parsing) pdf.js via CDN (PDF text extraction) Gemini API (optional AI review)
